data.content: Implemented stronger purple/green settings polish: enriched sheet shell glow, bolder section-card gradients/rings, and upgraded OpenRouter/defaults control surfaces and interaction states. Quality gates passed: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1934 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build (success). Feature commit: ddb6d5da1bc3.
